summary.en: Ownership and redaction on project routes.

mermaid:
flowchart TB
  subgraph ui [Frontend]
    Shell[Shell]
    Auth[Auth Gate]
    Modules[App Modules]
  end
  subgraph api [Edge]
    Routes[Project-scoped Routes]
    Own[Ownership Checks]
    Redact[Redaction]
  end

    Supabase[Supabase]
  end
  Auth --> Modules
  Modules --> Routes
  Routes --> Own
  Own --> Redact
